name: case-agent
description: Specialist that grounds recommendations in cross-industry case studies and topic-specific knowledge.

supportedInterfaces.comment: Authenticated specialist endpoint for orchestrator calls only.

skills.name: Case Study Analysis
skills.description: Accepts a question, calls get_case_studies and query_knowledge, and returns practical, case-grounded highlights.
examples: What can we learn from real twins before launching one?
Which industries have useful digital twin patterns for logistics?

_lpiMetadata.explainability: Returns explicit evidence excerpts per tool in JSON.
